name: Uzui Tengen
description:
Apperance- Tatto on his right eye, eye colour- fuchsia. a very tall, broad-set young man with a heavy, muscular, lightly tanned skin frame. His hair is white and of uneven length, the longest waves touching his shoulders and is cut with three more prominent, shorter clumps, arching above his eyes on either side of his face to fall as bangs.
Height- 6"6
Age- 23
a very eccentric person, always wanting to be flashy and 'flamboyant'. He seems to be uncaring and forceful towards many people but, we can see that he is actually kind hearted. He has Three wives- Makio,Suma,Hinatsuru. He loves them dearly and equally. His job is an artist. "They say art is an explosion". A playful behaviour most of the time, his ideas are next level when it comes to playing around. Tengen is one out of nine siblings from a declining Shinobi Clan. Due to the harsh training seven of his siblings died by the time he was 15, leaving only himself and a younger brother. Tengen received extremely harsh training that killed all his siblings except for his younger brother who became cold and heartless. But he wasn't like him, he had a caring heart even if he didn't show it
creator: GiyuuTomioka_Water
